scripts.dev: npm run build:public && npx esbuild js/guest.js --bundle --outdir=public/dist --servedir=public --serve=8080
scripts.build:public: npm run build && node -e "const fs = require('fs-extra'); fs.ensureDir('public').then(() => Promise.all(['assets', 'css', 'dist', 'index.html', 'dashboard.html'].map((f) => fs.copy(f, 'public/' + f)))).then(() => console.log('Built public/ folder'));"
